content: Airbyte Postgres destination: each stream lands as raw table in airbyte_internal schema with _airbyte_raw_id (UUID VARCHAR), _airbyte_extracted_at (timestamptz), _airbyte_loaded_at, _airbyte_data (JSONB); typing+dedup produce final typed tables. Downstream consumers should read FINAL tables not raw (raw is a staging ground, no stability guarantee); incremental consumption via _airbyte_extracted_at watermark. NOTE: destination-postgres v3.0.0 deprecates raw tables (Direct Load writes final tables directly) - design importer against final tables + extracted_at cursor, not airbyte_internal.
